scenario.name: Rahul
scenario.key_situation: Second attempt, scored 87 percentile last year, wants to crack 99+

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello Rahul ji! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Aapne JEE ke liye inquiry ki thi na? How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan ma'am, namaste. Main theek hun. Actually mujhe JEE ki preparation ke baare mein jaanna tha.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Main aapki help kar sakti hun. Pehle ye bataiye - aap currently which class mein hai aur kab se JEE ki preparation kar rahe hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Ma'am main dropper hun. Last year JEE diya tha but result accha nahi aaya. Ab dobara try kar raha hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I see. Last year kitna percentile aaya tha aur ab kitna target kar rahe hai? Aur exam kitne months mein hai?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 87 percentile aaya tha ma'am. Iss bar 99+ chahiye taaki acchi college mil jaye. Sirf 3 months bache hai ab to.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wow, 87 se 99+ - that's a great goal Rahul! 3 months mein definitely possible hai. Pehle ye batao - last year koi coaching li thi ya self study ki thi?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Ma'am offline coaching thi but teacher properly nahi padhate the. Aur doubt clearing bhi problem thi. Isliye iss bar online soch raha hun.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Understandable. Aur konse subjects mein weak feel karte hai? Physics, Chemistry ya Maths mein kahan improvement chahiye?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Physics aur Maths mein thoda weak hun ma'am. Chemistry theek thaak hai. Numerical problems solve karne mein time lagta hai zyada.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Main samjh gayi. Aur ek important question - final decision aap khud le sakte hai ya parents se discuss karna padega?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Nahi ma'am, main khud decide kar sakta hun. Parents ne kaha hai jo best lage wo kar lo.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent! Rahul, aapki profile ke hisaab se main recommend karungi hamara 'Lakshya JEE Mains 2025' batch. Ye specially droppers aur repeat attempt wale students ke liye designed hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan ma'am, iske baare mein detail mein batayiye. Kya features hai isme?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Dekho, isme daily live classes hai Alakh sir aur top faculty ke saath. Physics aur Maths pe extra focus hai. Plus 24/7 doubt solving, previous year papers ki detailed analysis, aur crash course format hai jo 3 months mein complete syllabus cover karta hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Sounds good ma'am! Aur kya mock tests bhi included hai? Mujhe lagta hai practice ki kami thi last time.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! Daily practice questions, weekly full length mocks, aur subject wise tests bhi hai. Plus performance analysis milti hai jisme pata chal jata hai exactly kahan improve karna hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Ye to bahut accha lag raha hai ma'am. Fees kitni hai iska? Aur kab se start hoga?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Fees hai ₹4,999 for complete 3 months package. Aur next Monday se fresh batch start ho raha hai which is perfect timing for you. EMI option bhi available hai agar chahiye.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: EMI ki zaroorat nahi ma'am. Ye price to quite reasonable hai. Aur agar doubts hai to kaise clear kar sakte hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! App mein doubt section hai jahan 1-2 hours mein expert teachers answer kar dete hai. Plus live doubt sessions bhi weekly hoti hai where you can directly ask.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect ma'am! Main interested hun. Enrollment kaise kar sakta hun? Aur kya guarantee hai improvement ki?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Enrollment to main abhi kar sakti hun aapka! Aur dekho Rahul, guarantee to nahi de sakte but hamari success rate bahut acchi hai. 87 se 99+ jane wale bahut students hai hamare paas.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan ma'am, samjh gaya. Aap enroll kar dijiye. Payment kaise karna hai?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful! Main aapko payment link share kar rahi hun WhatsApp pe. UPI, card, net banking sab options available hai. Payment ke baad immediately access mil jayega.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Perfect ma'am! Thank you so much for explaining everything properly. Link send kar dijiye.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Most welcome Rahul! Link sent. Aur remember, 3 months mein 99+ bilkul possible hai agar consistency rakhi. Main personally check karungi aapka progress. All the best!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much ma'am! Really appreciate your help. Will start studying seriously from Monday itself.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's the spirit! Agar koi bhi doubt ya help chahiye to feel free to call. You've got this Rahul! See you in the batch soon. Take care!
